---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for Aura
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: 'enhancement'
assignees: ''
---

## Title

[Clear, concise title describing the feature]

## Description

Provide a clear description of the feature you'd like to see implemented and why it would be valuable for Aura.

## Use Case

Describe the problem this feature would solve or the value it would add:
- Who would benefit from this feature?
- What problem does it solve?
- How would it improve the product traceability experience?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you envision this feature working:

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] [Specific requirement 1]
- [ ] [Specific requirement 2]
- [ ] [Specific requirement 3]
- [ ] Follows [Design System](/docs/brand/DESIGN_SYSTEM.md) guidelines (if UI change)
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Tests added

## Technical Considerations

- **Smart Contracts**: Does this require contract changes?
- **Backend**: Does this require API changes?
- **Frontend**: Does this require UI changes?

## Context for AI/Contributors

Before implementing, please review:
- [Contributing Guide](https://github.com/Josue19-08/Aura/blob/main/docs/CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [Design System](https://github.com/Josue19-08/Aura/blob/main/docs/brand/DESIGN_SYSTEM.md)
- [Architecture Documentation](https://github.com/Josue19-08/Aura/tree/main/docs/architecture)
- [Product Specifications](https://github.com/Josue19-08/Aura/tree/main/docs/product)

**Recommended**: Review the entire `/docs` folder for complete project context: https://github.com/Josue19-08/Aura/tree/main/docs

## Additional Notes

[Any additional context, mockups, references, or considerations]
